# `DecRange`

**Systems:** MOS6502  
**Parameters:** `b,b,b`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>DecRange( [address] , [start] , [end] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[address] - the address to decrement</li>
    <li>[start] - if decrease would hit this value, roll over to [end]</li>
    <li>[end] - value stored when rollover happens</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Decreases the byte value at the address with 1. If decreasing the value would cause value to hit [start], stores [end] to value instead.
</p>

<p>Notice that if variable value is outside the [start] and [end] range when calling this, function might misbehave.</p>

<h3>Examples</h3>

<code>
decRange(my_variable, 255, 42);  // decrease my_variable by 1, keeping it between 0 and 42
decRange(my_array[i], 10, 13);  // decrease my_array[i] by 1, keeping it between 11 and 13
</code>


</div>
